config.title: Kreator importu kontaktów - Update
config.script:
#include "50200"
dim con dim obj dim newklient
function set_con(byval contact) set con = contact end function
function set_obj(byval id) set obj = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KLIENT_PRACOWNIK , id) end function
function display page_.ctrl(CTRL_NAME_OBJ).text = obj.strImie page_.ctrl(CTRL_NAME_CON).text = con.FirstName if obj.strImie <> con.FirstName then page_.ctrl(CTRL_NAME_CHK).hide = false end if
page_.ctrl(CTRL_NAME2_OBJ).text = obj.strImie2 page_.ctrl(CTRL_NAME2_CON).text = con.MiddleName if obj.strImie2 <> con.MiddleName then page_.ctrl(CTRL_NAME2_CHK).hide = false end if
page_.ctrl(CTRL_NAMEL_OBJ).text = obj.strNazwisko page_.ctrl(CTRL_NAMEL_CON).text = con.LastName if page_.ctrl(CTRL_NAMEL_OBJ).text <> page_.ctrl(CTRL_NAMEL_CON).text then page_.ctrl(CTRL_NAMEL_CHK).hide = false end if
page_.ctrl(CTRL_STAN_OBJ).text = obj.strStanowisko page_.ctrl(CTRL_STAN_CON).text = con.JobTitle if page_.ctrl(CTRL_STAN_OBJ).text <> page_.ctrl(CTRL_STAN_CON).text then page_.ctrl(CTRL_STAN_CHK).hide = false end if
page_.ctrl(CTRL_TIT_OBJ).text = obj.strTytul page_.ctrl(CTRL_TIT_CON).text = con.Title if page_.ctrl(CTRL_TIT_OBJ).text <> page_.ctrl(CTRL_TIT_CON).text then page_.ctrl(CTRL_TIT_CHK).hide = false end if
page_.ctrl(CTRL_PRAC_OBJ).text = obj.pKlient.strNazwa dim klientid:klientid = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5KLIENT,"strNazwa like '%" + con.CompanyName +"%'") if klientid < 0 then klientid = fire_choice_list (TYPEID_N5KLIENT,"Wybierz klienta - kontatkowi odpowiada więcej niż jeden klient z bazy","strNazwa","strNazwa like '%" + con.CompanyName +"%'","","") end if if klientid > 0 then set newklient = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KLIENT , klientid) else set newklient = nothing end if if newklient is nothing then page_.ctrl(CTRL_PRAC_CON).text = "" page_.ctrl(CTRL_PRAC_CHK).hide = true else page_.ctrl(CTRL_PRAC_CON).text = newklient.strNazwa page_.ctrl(CTRL_PRAC_CHK).hide = false end if
if page_.ctrl(CTRL_PRAC_OBJ).text <> page_.ctrl(CTRL_PRAC_CON).text then end if
page_.ctrl(CTRL_EM1_OBJ).text = obj.strEmail page_.ctrl(CTRL_EM1_CON).text = con.Email1Address if page_.ctrl(CTRL_EM1_OBJ).text <> page_.ctrl(CTRL_EM1_CON).text then page_.ctrl(CTRL_EM1_CHK).hide = false end if
page_.ctrl(CTRL_EM2_OBJ).text = obj.strEmail2 page_.ctrl(CTRL_EM2_CON).text = con.Email2Address if page_.ctrl(CTRL_EM2_OBJ).text <> page_.ctrl(CTRL_EM2_CON).text then page_.ctrl(CTRL_EM2_CHK).hide = false end if
page_.ctrl(CTRL_WWW_OBJ).text = obj.strWWW page_.ctrl(CTRL_WWW_CON).text = con.WebPage if page_.ctrl(CTRL_WWW_OBJ).text <> page_.ctrl(CTRL_WWW_CON).text then page_.ctrl(CTRL_WWW_CHK).hide = false end if
page_.ctrl(CTRL_TEL1_OBJ).text = obj.strTel1 page_.ctrl(CTRL_TEL1_CON).text = con.BusinessTelephoneNumber if page_.ctrl(CTRL_TEL1_OBJ).text <> page_.ctrl(CTRL_TEL1_CON).text then page_.ctrl(CTRL_TEL1_CHK).hide = false end if
page_.ctrl(CTRL_TEL2_OBJ).text = obj.strTel2 page_.ctrl(CTRL_TEL2_CON).text = con.MobileTelephoneNumber if page_.ctrl(CTRL_TEL2_OBJ).text <> page_.ctrl(CTRL_TEL2_CON).text then page_.ctrl(CTRL_TEL2_CHK).hide = false end if
page_.ctrl(CTRL_TEL3_OBJ).text = obj.strTel3 page_.ctrl(CTRL_TEL3_CON).text = con.HomeTelephoneNumber if page_.ctrl(CTRL_TEL3_OBJ).text <> page_.ctrl(CTRL_TEL3_CON).text then page_.ctrl(CTRL_TEL3_CHK).hide = false end if
page_.ctrl(CTRL_FAX_OBJ).text = obj.strFax page_.ctrl(CTRL_FAX_CON).text = con.BusinessFaxNumber if page_.ctrl(CTRL_FAX_OBJ).text <> page_.ctrl(CTRL_FAX_CON).text then page_.ctrl(CTRL_FAX_CHK).hide = false end if
end function
function fok() if Update then page_.result = true page_.goback end if end function
function fcancel() page_.result = false page_.goback end function
function Update
if page_.ctrl(CTRL_NAME_CHK).value = "1" then obj.strImie = con.FirstName end if
if page_.ctrl(CTRL_NAME2_CHK).value = "1" then obj.strImie2 = con.MiddleName end if
if page_.ctrl(CTRL_NAMEL_CHK).value = "1" then obj.strNazwisko = con.LastName end if
if page_.ctrl(CTRL_STAN_CHK).value = "1" then obj.strStanowisko = con.JobTitle end if
if page_.ctrl(CTRL_TIT_CHK).value = "1" then obj.strTytul = con.Title end if
if page_.ctrl(CTRL_EM1_CHK).value = "1" then obj.strEmail = con.Email1Address end if
if page_.ctrl(CTRL_EM2_CHK).value = "1" then obj.strEmail2 = con.Email2Address end if
if page_.ctrl(CTRL_WWW_CHK).value = "1" then obj.strWWW = con.WebPage end if
if page_.ctrl(CTRL_PRAC_CHK).value = "1" then if not newklient is nothing then obj.pKlient = newklient end if end if
if page_.ctrl(CTRL_TEL1_CHK).value = "1" then obj.strTel1 = con.BusinessTelephoneNumber end if
if page_.ctrl(CTRL_TEL2_CHK).value = "1" then obj.strTel2 = con.MobileTelephoneNumber end if
if page_.ctrl(CTRL_TEL3_CHK).value = "1" then obj.strTel3 = con.HomeTelephoneNumber end if
if page_.ctrl(CTRL_FAX_CHK).value = "1" then obj.strFax = con.BusinessFaxNumber end if
Update = trans_.saveobjects
end function

page.body:
Wartość pola
Wartość z Outlook'a
Pracodawca
Aktualizuj
Imie
Aktualizuj
Drugie imię
Aktualizuj
Nazwisko
Aktualizuj
Stanowisko
Aktualizuj
Tytuł
Aktualizuj
E-mail służbowy
Aktualizuj
E-mail prywatny
Aktualizuj
Strona WWW
Aktualizuj
Telefon służbowy
Aktualizuj
Telefon służbowy komórkowy
Aktualizuj
Telefon prywatny
Aktualizuj
Numer faksu
Aktualizuj
XFDIALOGBUTTONS
